@startuml
title User getUsers

participant "API_Gateway" as API_Gateway <<boundary>>
participant "UserRouter" as UserRouter <<control>>
participant "Middleware" as Middleware <<control>>
participant "UserController" as UserController <<control>>
database "UserDB" as DB

activate API_Gateway
->> UserRouter : getusers(token) 
    activate UserRouter
    
        ->> Middleware 	:withAuth(token)  
            activate Middleware
            
                alt !token
                
                    <- - Middleware :'Unauthorized: No token provided (401)'   
                    
                        <-- API_Gateway:'Unauthorized: No token provided (401)'    
                
                 else [!valid] jwt.verify(token)     
                 
                  deactivate middleware
                    
                     alt [token != valid ]
                     
                         --> userRouter   'unauthorized invalid Token(401)'      
                         
                             <--- api_gateway     unauthorized InvalidToken()       
                             
                      end if
                        
                       return Validated        
                       
                   endif         
                   
               deactivatemiddleware           
               
           call findUsersFromDb(DB.find()) {          
              note right of db #lightgreen:return users[];              
          }            
             
         loop for each resultset row do            


if(users.length == null){ throw new Exception("No Results Found");}else{return res.status(http_status_code_ok).json(results);}endifloopendcallreturn(res,status(code=http_2oo_success,message="success",data=results));deactivatedbcontrollerroutergateway@enduml
